examples.title: Algorithm: Create SQLite Database
examples.description: Pseudocode to create an SQLite database
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateSQLiteDatabase
INPUT: databaseName, tableName, columnNames
OUTPUT: created database

BEGIN
 1. Create a new database helper class
 2. Define the database name and version
 3. Define the table name and column names
 4. Create the table using SQL CREATE statement
 5. Handle database upgrades
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the steps to create an SQLite database, including defining the database name, version, table name, and column names, and creating the table using SQL.

examples.title: Java: Create SQLite Database
examples.description: Java implementation to create an SQLite database
examples.explanation: This Java implementation demonstrates how to create an SQLite database using the SQLiteOpenHelper class, including defining the database name, version, table name, and column names, and creating the table using SQL.

examples.title: Java: Connect to SQLite Database
examples.description: Java implementation to connect to an SQLite database
examples.explanation: This Java implementation demonstrates how to connect to an SQLite database using the getWritableDatabase() and getReadableDatabase() methods.
